message:
fix(vdbe): enforce CHECK constraints on INSERT and UPDATE

CHECK constraint expressions were parsed and stored in TableSchema but
never validated during DML execution. Add emit_check_constraints() to
VDBE codegen that evaluates each CHECK expression using register-based
column resolution and emits Halt(SQLITE_CONSTRAINT) on false results.
NULL results pass per SQLite semantics. Applied to all INSERT paths
(values, default values, INSERT...SELECT) and both UPDATE paths.

Also fix duplicate test function names and remove #[ignore] from CHECK
constraint test now that enforcement is implemented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
